expectations.text: Loads the create-confluence-document sub-skill or references confluence-formatting.md
expectations.evidence: Does not load any sub-skill or reference file. States 'No Confluence storage format reference' as a barrier.

expectations.text: Builds storage format HTML body containing ac:structured-macro for toc
expectations.evidence: Body contains '<ac:structured-macro ac:name="toc">' with maxLevel and minLevel parameters

expectations.text: Includes an ac:structured-macro with ac:name='info' for the overview panel
Includes ac:structured-macro with ac:name='code' for code blocks
expectations.evidence: Multiple code blocks with '<ac:structured-macro ac:name="code">' for bash and javascript languages

expectations.text: Includes ac:structured-macro with ac:name='expand' for troubleshooting items
expectations.evidence: Three expand macros for '401 Unauthorized', 'Pagination returns duplicate results', and '500 Internal Server Error'

expectations.text: Writes the HTML body to a temporary file
Uses confluence.mjs create-page with --body-file flag (not --body for long content)
expectations.evidence: Does not use confluence.mjs. Uses raw curl POST to '/wiki/api/v2/pages'. Mentions confluence.mjs only hypothetically: 'if a CLI helper script (e.g., confluence.mjs) were available'.

expectations.text: Uses --space TEAM in the create command
expectations.evidence: Does not use --space TEAM. Uses raw REST API with spaceId parameter. States 'this task cannot be completed programmatically by the agent.'
